question.label: Support needed
question.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
question.description: Closes on concrete support and next-step stability without opening a new issue.

answer: I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

assessment.note: Names a specific absence — real authority to match bigger directional ownership — which signals mild instability and unclear decision rights.

new_queue.label: Priority ranking
new_queue.name: If you had to cut your work in half tomorrow, what would you drop first — and what's non-negotiable?

issues: ref_alias q_support_needed_11 not in remaining queue — treating as new
